JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-17-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT OPEN DOOR LEGAL (SUED ERRONEOUSLY AS OPEN DOOR DEMURRER to COMPLAINT)

Off calendar. The parties have not met and conferred in compliance with CCP 430.41. The parties are ordered to meet and confer and defendants' response to the complaint is now due by September 16, 2022. Plaintiff must comply with the code and meet and confer by phone or in person.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
